response_constraints: Answer only from successfully fetched content; search snippets are not evidence.
Cite the fetched primary URL and its source ID.
State the requested fact directly and keep any inference separate from sourced facts.
Do not include phone numbers, email addresses, or outreach suggestions.

arguments.query: "Brighton Tram Heritage Depot" Brighton operator official

stages.purpose: Identify the authoritative organization and disambiguate same-name entities by locality and subject.

arguments.query: "Brighton Transit Museum Board" "Brighton Tram Heritage Depot" lead architect original design dossier

stages.purpose: Use the resolved organization name to locate a primary record for the requested fact.
Read the selected primary record rather than relying on its search snippet.

state_assertions: No persistent state changes occur; both research tools are read-only in this fictional simulator.

prompt: For a heritage inventory, identify the authoritative body responsible for the Brighton Tram Heritage Depot in Brighton, then fetch an official design dossier or property register that names its original lead architect. Do not substitute the builder or a later restoration architect. Do not include contact details or suggest sending a message.

fetch_primary.title: Brighton Tram Heritage Depot original design dossier
fetch_primary.content: The signed design dossier credits Florence Kim as lead architect for the original Brighton Tram Heritage Depot. It names North Quay Works as the builder and does not identify a structural engineer.
